rationale.D1: Confirmed IO interfaces (WheelIO, ClimbIO, SlapdownIO, TurretIO, HoodIO, ModuleIO, GyroIO) each with Real + Sim + No (null-object) implementations across virtually every mechanism — full layer with null-object pattern approaching L4, but no generic parameterized base.
rationale.D2: Robot.java uses standard command-based button bindings with no Superstructure, no state machine, no WantedState enum, and no goal-fanout coordinator — confirmed by searching the entire src/main tree.
rationale.D3: Confirmed ElevatorSim in SimClimb, SimModule (DCMotorSim-backed) for drive, VisionSystemSim with PhotonCameraSim for vision, and custom SpringLoadedClimbSim — multiple mechanism physics sims wired into IO impls; no maple-sim.
rationale.D4: Confirmed 14 real test files using UnitTestingUtil.fastForward and runToCompletion (ClimbTest, SwerveTest, AlignTest, TurretTest, ShooterTest, etc.); CI runs gradle build which includes the test task; broad suite with sim-backed subsystem assertions.
rationale.D5: Confirmed Epilogue @Logged annotations across Robot, Drive, Climb, Turret, Slapdown, Vision subsystems, plus URCL, DataLogManager, FaultLogger, and custom LoggingUtils.log() — broad structured logging but not AdvantageKit (no @AutoLog/processInputs); FaultLogger provides operational diagnostics.
rationale.D6: Confirmed PathPlannerLib AutoBuilder fully configured with real constraints and a RepulsorFieldPlanner (reactive obstacle avoidance) wired into Alignment commands used in teleop and auto; Choreo SwerveSample type used for sample-following in Drive but no .traj files deployed.
rationale.D7: Confirmed multi-camera PhotonPoseEstimator with std-dev tuning, per-tag weight/distance rejection, addVisionMeasurement with timestamps, and VisionSystemSim — fused filtered estimation; no dedicated RobotState class or TimeInterpolatableBuffer.
rationale.D8: Confirmed GitHub Actions CI (gradle build includes tests), spotless + PMD with custom ruleset, real README with structure docs and a history.json; no separate season-independent library repo (lib/ lives in-tree).
